howItWorks.intro: This chatbot savings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Current Cost = (Tickets × Handle Time ÷ 60) × Hourly Rate
Tickets Deflected = Total Tickets × Deflection Rate
New Cost = Remaining Agent Cost + Bot Subscription
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is chatbot deflection rate?
faq.answer: Deflection rate is the percentage of customer inquiries fully resolved by the chatbot without human intervention. Well-implemented bots achieve 30-60% deflection on common questions.

faq.question: How much does a customer support chatbot cost?
faq.answer: Basic rule-based chatbots: $50-$200/month. AI-powered chatbots: $200-$1,000/month. Enterprise solutions: $1,000-$10,000+/month. Costs vary by volume and complexity.

faq.question: Will a chatbot replace my support team?
faq.answer: Chatbots handle routine inquiries (password resets, order tracking, FAQs), freeing agents for complex issues. Most companies reduce headcount by 20-40% while improving response times.

howWeCalculate.intro: This chatbot savings calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
